commits.title: auto-generate changelog from git log at build time
add changelog page with discrete footer link
système de hints AP via item notes + logos AP colorés
details: Remplace l'ancien système de hints (halos colorés/badges snowflake) par des item notes sur les pins
Ajoute 5 logos AP colorés (rouge/blanc/jaune/bleu/vert) comme items sélectionnables
Les hints AP sont mappés automatiquement par flags : progression=jaune, trap=rouge, useful=bleu, junk=blanc
Supprime les notes quand une location est cochée
Réorganise la grille PICKER_ITEMS en 6×8
Ajoute les Kinstones generiques (rouge/bleu/vert/or) et les clés dans le picker
Met à jour le submodule TMC-APWorld

commits.title: auto-generate data & logic from TMC-APWorld submodule at build time
details: Add SubModule/TMC-APWorld git submodule (branch dev)
Add scripts/gen_rules.py: transpile APWorld rules.py → rules_generated.js via AST
Add scripts/migrate_coords.py: convert map coords to {id, location:[{map,x,y}]} format
Split overworld coords into per-area JSON files (import.meta.glob in MapView)
Refactor scripts/extract_tmc_data.py: generate location_meta.json, names.json, ap_tables.json
Update package.json: prebuild/predev run generate pipeline (extract + gen_rules)
Add build:ci script (vite build without prebuild, for GitHub Actions)
Fix CI workflow: checkout submodules, setup-python, run scripts explicitly
Update accessibility.js: import REGION_RULES/LOCATION_RULES from rules_generated.js
Remove scripts/extract_map_coords.py and src_info/ (no longer needed)

commits.title: show overworld area selector for all users
show Régions button only in dev mode
remove Régions button from navbar
hide overworld area selector buttons outside dev mode
change default auto tab settings (dungeons: overview, overworld: off)
dungeon floor maps, overworld area zones, auto tab switching, autotrack item fix
details: Add per-floor map coords JSON for all 7 dungeons (DWS, CoF, FoW, ToD, RC, PoW, DHC)
Add overworld area zone coords (16 zones) and sub-map images from reference tracker
Add room_area_to_zone.json for room_area → overworld zone mapping
MapView: floor selector for dungeons, area selector for overworld, mouse coords (dev only)
Settings: Auto tab Dungeons (Off/Overview/Floor) and Auto tab Overworld (Off/On)
bizhawk.js / client.js: auto-switch active view and zone on room change
ItemGrid: fix autotrack items not displaying (key name mapping for BOMB_BAG, WALLET, BOTTLE)
stateStore: add activeZone ref and setActiveZone action

commits.title: read dungeon warps and wind crests from both sd.options and top-level sd
hide sanctuary items by default (not yet in AP)
ToD Big Octo needs canSplit(2); version-aware fuse event mapping for bizhawk <= 0.3.1
fusion item names, heart piece name, cabin swim no longer a trick
Library Yellow needs only 3 books; fix book names to match AP table; map PROGRESSIVE_BOOK; fix Carlov NPC
add AP chat panel
add contents:write permission for release creation
add vite-plugin-singlefile dependency
add build & release workflow + fix image base paths
Initial commit — TMC Archipelago tracker web
